title: CleanSpark Stock Price Forecast: $14.80 Resistance Level
text: CleanSpark stock extends rally above $13.90 with $14.80 serving as key technical resistance level. The stock has gained 4.76% following Q2 earnings announcement and subsequent trading activity. Technical analysis shows CLSK maintains support levels at $13.20-13.70 with resistance at $14.80-15.50. The trading range reflects investor uncertainty about CleanSpark's near-term earnings amid bitcoin price volatility while maintaining longer-term conviction about the company's AI infrastructure strategy. Key technical levels guide short-term trading decisions and options strategy for market participants. Price movements around earnings announcements typically trigger volatility that resets technical levels for subsequent trading periods.
